data.title: XORTX Announces Share Consolidation
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a late-stage clinical pharmaceutical company specializing in gout and progressive kidney disease treatments, has received approval from its board of directors to consolidate its common shares. The consolidation, effective from March 27, 2025, will see one post-consolidation share issued for every five pre-consolidation shares. This move will not result in a name change for the company. XORTX is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol XRTX, TSXV as XRTX, and Frankfurt as ANU.
TSA Staffing Crisis Could Close Airports — How To Fly Your Portfolio To Safety

data.title: Karman Posts Mixed Results, Lifts Outlook On Defense Demand
data.description: Karman Holdings, a company specializing in defense products, reported a combination of positive and negative results for the fourth quarter. Despite this, the company decided to raise its future expectations due to the significant increase in demand for defense products. This decision comes as the company seeks to capitalize on the growing market by adapting its strategies accordingly. The specific numbers detailing the Q4 results were not provided in the article.

data.title: Cheesecake Factory Cooking Up Fresh Run To An All-Time High?
data.description: The Cheesecake Factory has demonstrated a positive trend in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. There are indications suggesting that the company may be on track to reach a new all-time high.

data.title: Woodside Assumes Control of Beaumont New Ammonia Operations
data.description: Woodside Energy has officially taken over the operational management of the Beaumont New Ammonia (BNA) plant in southeast Texas after completing performance testing, succeeding OCI Global. The facility, with a capacity to manufacture and export up to 1.1 million tons of ammonia annually, further broadens Woodside’s asset range. Estimated to potentially double US ammonia exports, which would facilitate regional economic expansion, the CEO Liz Westcott expressed optimism about this development.

data.title: Suncrete and Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 Announce Entering Into Non-Redemption Agreements with Certain Institutional Investors
data.description: Concrete Partners Holding, LLC, known as Suncrete, a company specializing in ready-mix concrete logistics and distribution, is strategically based in Oklahoma and Arkansas. Recently, they announced a partnership with Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE: HYAC), a publicly traded company. This collaboration brings together Suncrete's expertise in the concrete industry with Haymaker's established presence in the market. The move is set to enhance operations in the region and drive growth for both companies. Keep an eye on the developments as Suncrete and Haymaker join forces to strengthen their positions in the industry.

data.title: Crosby Enterprises, LLC Announces Voluntary Chapter 11 Filings to Facilitate Financial Restructuring for Three Subsidiaries
data.description: GALLIANO, La., March 25, 2026 - Crosby Enterprises, LLC disclosed plans to sustain operations seamlessly while focusing on debt reduction and bolstering its financial position. The Company initiated chapter 11 cases for a few of its entities in its efforts to restructure and improve its balance sheet. This move aims to strengthen the Company's position by addressing its financial obligations effectively.
Africa Energy Announces 2025 Year End Results

data.title: Royce Global Trust (NYSE: RGT) as of Feb 28, 2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in New York, a closed-end fund was launched targeting global equities through a disciplined value strategy. The fund witnesses an average weekly trading volume of around 121,009 shares. The adviser of the fund boasts over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. This fund focuses on long-term growth.

data.title: BlackRock® Canada Announces Final March Cash Distributions for the iShares® Premium Money Market ETF
data.description: BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited, a subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc., recently disclosed the final March 2026 cash distributions for the iShares Premium Money Market ETF. The cash distributions are set for unitholders of record as of March 26, 2026, with payments scheduled for March 31, 2026.

data.title: Bellwether Coffee Expands to Australia through New Partnership with Xtracted Espresso Solutions
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, innovative electric roasters are revolutionizing the way local cafes prepare fresh, high-quality coffee on-site. Bellwether Coffee is introducing easy-to-use, plug-and-play roasters that are changing the game for cafés and retailers. The company's solution, announced on March 25, 2026 in partnership with a Californian entity, aims to make in-house roasting more accessible and efficient. This development is set to significantly impact the coffee industry, offering businesses a seamless way to produce exceptional coffee products within their establishments.

data.title: Macfox Launches Easter Sale: Up to $100 Off Select Electric Bikes + Free Mirror Set
data.description: A company based in Corona, CA disclosed on March 25, 2026, an upcoming Easter Sale by Macfox. Customers looking to buy specific Macfox electric bikes can take advantage of the promotion, which includes a $100 discount. The sale applies to the X7, X1S, X1S x Bs.zay, and X2 models during the limited-time event.

data.title: "Climate Realism Rising" Heartland Institute Conference ICCC16 will Challenge the WMO Climate Catastrophe Claims says Friends of Science Society
data.description: Heartland Institute's 16th International Conference on Climate (ICCC16), happening in Calgary, AB on March 25, 2026, will feature speakers discussing various perspectives on climate science. The conference aims to challenge the prevailing narrative of human-caused climate catastrophes and greenhouse gas emissions put forth by the World Meteorological Organization (WMO) and UN Secretary-General Guterres. The event will bring together experts to explore different viewpoints on climate change.

data.title: Royce Small-Cap Trust (NYSE: RVT) as of Feb 28, 2026
data.description: The oldest and biggest small-cap closed-end fund, with an average weekly trading volume of around 1.6 million shares, is managed by an adviser boasting over five decades of small- and micro-cap investment expertise. As of February 28, 2026, the closing prices were reported as NAV 19.57 and MKT 18.36 in New York.

data.title: Asian currencies plunge as governments struggle with soaring oil, priced in USD. From India to South Korea, economies suffer.
data.description: Currencies across various Asian countries such as India, Southeast Asia, and South Korea are witnessing a decline due to governments rushing to procure fuel which is denominated in US dollars. This trend is prevalent as these nations aim to secure their energy needs amidst fluctuating global economic conditions.

data.title: Southland Receives Notice to Proceed on $118 Million of Projects Led by Data Center
data.description: A company based in Grapevine, Texas, known as Southland Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: SLND and SLND WS), has revealed that it has been given the green light to commence work on three major projects. These projects, which will fall under its Civil segment and are being overseen by its subsidiary Oscar Renda Contracting, have a collective worth of approximately $118 million. One of the upcoming ventures is a $48 million Data Center project designed for a private client situated in the Southwest. The task involves intricate work like the setup of chilled water pipelines and will significantly boost the company’s fourth quarter 2025 backlog.

data.title: Golar LNG Limited announces strategic review to maximize stakeholder value and appoints Goldman Sachs as financial advisor
data.description: Golar LNG Limited (NASDAQ: GLNG) has announced that its Board of Directors has started a formal evaluation of strategic options for the Company. This move comes after the 4th Quarter 2025 results and aims to boost the FLNG growth pipeline and enhance shareholder value. The focus is on leveraging Golar's shift to a high-growth, pure-play Floating Liquefied Natural Gas (FLNG) firm. Goldman Sachs International has been chosen as the financial advisor for this initiative.

data.title: Rising above the drought: Canyon Lake eight feet higher than Spring 2025
data.description: Residents and tourists can look forward to enjoying water activities at Canyon Lake in Texas Hill Country this spring and summer. As of March 25, 2026, the lake stands out as a top destination, boasting increased water levels. Compared to Spring 2025, the current levels are up by eight feet, enhancing the overall experience for visitors. Canyon Lake's popularity as the "jewel of the hill country" makes it an attractive spot for recreational opportunities, attracting a significant number of people seeking outdoor fun.

data.title: Altum Faithful Investing Awards Gold Certification to Wallick Investments’ WI Fidelis Multi-Cap Multi-Factor Index (Fidelis 100)
data.description: A prestigious certification, Altum Faithful Investing Gold, has recently been bestowed upon Wallick Investments’ Fidelis 100 Index. This recognition is a testament to the index's commitment to adhering to responsible and ethical investment practices. The certification serves as a mark of distinction for the index, highlighting its dedication to sustainable and socially responsible investing. This recognition holds particular significance as it underscores Wallick Investments’ commitment to ensuring that the Fidelis 100 Index upholds the highest standards of ethical investing.

data.title: Kharg Island's vital role in Iran: exports 90% of crude oil, potential U.S. target. How will this impact the Iran war?
data.description: Kharg Island, situated in the Persian Gulf, serves as the focal point for exporting 90% of Iran's crude oil. The island has now emerged as a potential target for the United States. In a detailed analysis by Peter Eavis, our Business reporter, we explore the transformation of this small but critical island into a strategic asset carrying substantial risks.
